outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed by positive aggregate GEX (1.07B), but MONTHLY gamma flip near spot creates directional catalyst potential. Expect contained moves with upside bias toward Max Pain.
outlook.summary: Positive total GEX environment with bullish 0DTE reverse skew (ratio 0.62). Spot sits just 1.1% above monthly gamma flip at 24180 - key pivot zone. Dual RESONANCE levels at 25000 (CALL) and 23500 (PUT) define the structural range. Max Pain at 24600 acts as near-term magnet. Elevated PCR (1.24) on 0DTE suggests pessimism that could fuel short-covering rally.
